creator: tedm@toybox.placo.com
text:
This PR should be closed unless the submitter can
provide feedback indicating the problem still exists.
According to the driver CVS history, modifications
were made in the driver to improve detection.  The
submitter also provided a workaround in his followup.
Lastly, ISA slots are no longer provided in new 
hardware, obsoleting the 3c509b.
